ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the legislative session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session is held */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Name of the chairperson presiding over the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., Open, Closed, Adjourned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "bill_number" TEXT /* Official bill number */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the bill */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Session in which the bill was introduced */,
  "introduced_by" TEXT /* Name of the legislator who introduced the bill */,
  "committee" TEXT /* Committee to which the bill was referred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bill (e.g., Introduced, Passed, Vetoed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the vote belongs to */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill being voted on */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date of the vote */,
  "vote_result" TEXT /* Result of the vote (e.g., Confirmed, Not Sustained) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vote or motion */,
  "voting_method" TEXT /* Method used for voting (e.g., Roll Call, Voice, Division) */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who participated in the vote */,
  "absentees" INTEGER /* Number of voters who were absent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voters" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the voter */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the voter */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the voter (e.g., Senator, Representative) */,
  "district" TEXT /* District the voter represents */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the voter represents */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the voter (e.g., phone, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vote_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the result */,
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding vote */,
  "yea_total" INTEGER /* Total votes in favor (Yea) */,
  "nay_total" INTEGER /* Total votes against (Nay) */,
  "absent_total" INTEGER /* Total number of absent voters */,
  "abstain_total" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who abstained */,
  "percentage_yea" TEXT /* Percentage of votes in favor */,
  "percentage_nay" TEXT /* Percentage of votes against */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_results_vote_id FOREIGN KEY ("vote_id") REFERENCES votes ("vote_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vote related to the question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question posed */,
  "proposed_by" TEXT /* Name of the voter who proposed the question */,
  "amendment" INTEGER /* Whether the question is an amendment to the bill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_vote_id FOREIGN KEY ("vote_id") REFERENCES votes ("vote_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter performing the action */,
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vote being acted on */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., Vote, Abstain) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "voting_position" TEXT /* Specific position taken by the voter (e.g., Yea, Nay, Abstain) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the action (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_actions_vote_id FOREIGN KEY ("vote_id") REFERENCES votes ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_actions_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES voters ("voter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session where the topic is discussed */,
  "topic_text" TEXT /* Text of the topic */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the topic (e.g., Domestic, Foreign, Economic) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the topic (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., citizen, staff, legislator) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., Public, Staff, Legislator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the records */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
